customPath.description: Custom path to USMT amd64 folder if not standard ADK installation

xmlFiles.description: USMT rule XML files to pass to ScanState/LoadState

additionalArgs.description: Additional flags passed to ScanState/LoadState. Common flags include /c (continue on non-fatal errors), /v:1 (error logging only, default), /v:5 (verbose status logging), /v:13 (full debug logging), and /efs:skip.

userScope.description: Controls which user profiles ScanState captures. 'current' (default) captures only the user running the backup; 'all' captures every profile on the machine. Ignored when 'users' is non-empty.

users.description: Optional list of specific usernames to capture (e.g. 'Alice' or 'DOMAIN\Alice'). When non-empty, takes precedence over userScope. Each entry becomes a /ui: argument; all other users are excluded via /ue:*\*.

outputDir.description: Target folder for backup archives (supports environment variables)

retentionCount.description: Number of backup zip files to keep

compress.description: Compress backup store into ZIP archive

generateManifest.description: If true, USMT will automatically generate a plain-text manifest file containing a list of all gathered files.

excludePaths.description: User-specific directories or drives to exclude recursively

includePaths.description: List of paths to explicitly include in the backup, overriding default USMT omissions. Environment variables are supported.

taskName.description: Name of the Windows Scheduled Task

time.description: Trigger time for Daily task (HH:mm format)
